title: Cloud First Policy Version 1.0
summary: Creates direct public-sector data governance duties for cloud migration, including data ownership, data classification, backup, audit, security, data sovereignty, and open data publication of non-restricted government data.

theme_notes.data_privacy.data_governance_open_data: Requires Bahrain government entities to evaluate and use cloud services for government data and systems.
theme_notes.telecom_digital_infrastructure.cloud_dat: Government policy requiring cloud-first assessment and adoption.
theme_notes.digital_government.egovernment_services: Cloud-first policy for government digital services.

notes: Related instruments: Refers to Government Data Classification Guidelines and State Secret Law
